title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.060 - June 14, Flag Day
text:
9.060.  June 14, Flag Day. — The governor shall annually issue a proclamation setting apart June fourteenth as "Flag Day" and recommending to the people of the state that the day be appropriately observed in honor of and out of respect to the flag of the United States of America.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1368 § 1)
